items.title: MCD Stock Price Prediction: Where McDonald's Could Be by 2025, 2026, and 2030
items.description: Analysts are saying that McDonald's could rise by 2030. Bullish on MCD? If you want a low-cost way to invest, SoFi lets you buy McDonald's stock with zero commissions, and new users who fund their account can receive up to 1,000 dollars in stock. ...

items.title: Trump's Strategy Against Venezuela, Rubio's Briefing Demand And More: This Week In Politics
items.description: Over the weekend, key political developments included Trump's military moves in Venezuela, a pledge to help end Sudan's civil war, and sharp criticisms of his policies from U.S. lawmakers.
